examples: The white marble floors were inlaid in a radial pattern of brass.
The lid of the box had been inlaid with silver.
Cut from a cedar wood, it is exquisitely carved, inlaid and painted.
Bespoke shotguns are distinguished by their exquisite materials--walnut stocks and barrels inlaid with gold--and by their detail.
At the center was a wheel-shaped ballotine of chicken, inlaid with chicken liver, foie gras and Louisiana crayfish.
